title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You really did your best for me. Who's a good
trainer?! You are! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Could you keep a few of these in your
office?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I want to take care of them with you.
